title: cerasus vulgaris var. austera
intro: Cerasus vulgaris var. austera is a variety of the wild cherry tree, specifically a type of European bird cherry, known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its astringent and antiseptic properties, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cerasus vulgaris var. austera include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
